title: Starting Out
subtitle: Your first hours in the Antiquity age

tutorial.title: Starting Out
tutorial.subtitle: From bare hands to your first fire

objectives.label: Open the Chronicle
substeps: Press J at any time to open the Chronicle.
Every system you discover is recorded here.
Don't want this guide? Unpin it in the Chronicle to hide the tracker.

objectives.label: Smash gravel into flint
substeps: Find or dig up gravel.
Hold the gravel and right-click a rock or any hard stone surface.
Roughly one smash in four flakes off a piece of flint.

objectives.label: Knap a Flint Blade
substeps: Hold a piece of flint.
Right-click a hard stone surface to knap it into a Flint Blade.
The blade is your first cutting edge — it also gathers plant fiber and sticks.

objectives.label: Carve a Crafting Stone
substeps: Hold the Flint Blade.
Right-click a cobblestone block to carve it into a Crafting Stone.
Items placed on it craft in any order — your early workbench.

objectives.label: Make Fire Sticks
substeps: Add 2 sticks to the Crafting Stone.
When the result preview appears, shift-right-click the stone.
Pick up the Fire Sticks — your means to make fire.

objectives.label: Carve a Chopping Stump
substeps: Logs can't be punched out — knap a Bone or Stone Axe first.
Fell a tree, then place a single lone log on the ground.
Right-click the lone log with an axe to carve a Chopping Stump.

objectives.label: Split Firewood
substeps: Use the Chopping Stump to split logs into Firewood.
Firewood is the fuel that lights your first campfire.
A campfire is where founding a settlement begins.

objectives.label: Hunt a wild animal
substeps: Knap a Stone Spear (or craft a Primitive Bow) for the hunt.
Stalk a calm animal in a crouch — a spooked one will flee.
Kill it for meat, and later hide and feather for your crafts.

pages.text: From bare hands to a settlement

You begin with nothing but the land. This guide walks the first steps of the Antiquity age: knapping stone, making fire, and feeding yourself by the hunt. Follow the checklist on the left — each step completes on its own as you do it.

The earliest edge is &6flint&r. Smash gravel against a rock to flake off flint, then knap that flint against stone into a &6Flint Blade&r. The blade carves a &6Crafting Stone&r — your first workbench — where two sticks become &6Fire Sticks&r.

With an axe you fell trees and carve a lone log into a &6Chopping Stump&r, which splits logs into &6Firewood&r — the fuel for your first campfire and the start of a real settlement. Out on unclaimed land, the &6hunt&r brings back meat, hide, and feather.
Done with this guide? Open the Chronicle and &6unpin&r Starting Out to hide the tracker. You can re-pin it any time.
